channel.title: Road Labs — Race Database
channel.description: 427 road races rated and ranked on 14 criteria. Tier ratings, scores, locations, dates, and course details.

item.title: L'Etape du Tour — Tier 1, 90/100
item.description:
Tier 1 — Score: 90/100
Location: Bourg d'Oisans → Alpe d'Huez (via Col de Sarenne)
Date: July 19, 2026
Distance: 105.6 miles
Elevation: 17,717 ft
Ride a Tour de France mountain stage on fully closed roads — the closest an amateur gets to the real thing.

Date: July 5, 2026

item.title: Haute Route Dolomites — Tier 2, 80/100
item.description:

Location: Cortina d'Ampezzo / Bormio, Dolomites, Italy
Date: 2026: DISCONTINUED. Haute Route collapsed to Alps-only since 2025 (now run by French Velo Evenements/FVE). Dolomites edition last ran in 2023.
Distance: 280.0 miles
Elevation: 47,572 ft
450 kilometers and 14,500 meters of climbing across 5 stages through the Italian Dolomites and Alps — Stelvio, Gavia, Pordoi, and the jagged spires of UNESCO World Heritage mountains. Professional stage-race format for amateur cyclists who want to suffer like the pros.
